subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy remembrance is before the Divine Throne, and from the Dawning-Place of the Finger of the All-Merciful these revealed words have been sent down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ذکرت لدی العرش مذکور و از مشرق اصبع رحمانیه این کلمات منزله نازل
subcodes.subjects: @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @praise and encouragement, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @suffering and imprisonment
